youtubeChannels.name: Discover The Overseas
youtubeChannels.description: Discover the best places visit, live, or retire around the world with us! This channel explores the cheapest and easiest locations to visit or live and also places that offer incredible opportunities

bloggers.name: My Sardinian Life — The Raw Reality of Expat Life in Small Town Sardinia

bloggers.name: Expatra — Living in Sardinia: The Essential Expat Guide
bloggers.description: Long-form Sardinia expat guide: Cagliari (capital), Olbia (Costa Smeralda gateway), Alghero (NW coast). Pensioner tax incentive.

bloggers.name: Experience Sardinia — Living in Sardinia
bloggers.description: Long-running expat-life blog on Sardinia by an English-speaking resident.
